word: G1508 - εἰ μή - ei mḗ - i may - But

sections.paragraph:
- Original: έἰμή

- Transliteration: Ei me

- Phonetic: i may

- Definition:

1. if not, except, but

- Origin: from G1487 and G3361

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Conjunction

- Strong's: From G1487 and G3361; if not: - but except (that) if not more than save (only) that saving till.
